claims.summary: Dynamic projection must be deterministic for identical canonical input.
claims.disposition: verify stable projection vectors and exact repeatability fixtures

claims.summary: Epoch, kernel fingerprint, and checksum identity must make the active projection reviewable.
claims.disposition: verify projection health, kernel checksums, and compatibility identity

claims.summary: Changing the seed algorithm or projection kernel is a migration boundary, not an incidental refactor.
claims.disposition: verify the explicit seed-integrity and epoch-migration contract

claims.summary: A bounded collision probe can reveal obvious clumping without claiming global collision resistance.
claims.disposition: implement and run a 1,024-case distinct-seed and distinct-fingerprint regression over 256 texts and four chunk indices

claims.summary: Changing seed derivation, kernel identity, projection dimensions, or live codec ABI changes deployed semantics.
claims.disposition: require explicit Mike/operator Tier 5 approval with compatibility replay and canary
